extension.name: Easy!Appointments
extension.author: alextselegidis.com
extension.description: Joomla module to display an Easy!Appointments iframe.

field.name: iframe_notice
field.description:
Easy!Appointments 1.6.0 - Required Configuration

Easy!Appointments v1.6.0 introduced stricter HTTP security headers that block iframe embedding by default. If your booking form is not loading inside the page, you need to apply the following one-line fix to your Easy!Appointments installation.

Step 1: Open the file application/hooks/security_headers.php in your Easy!Appointments installation.

Step 2: Find the following line:

Step 3: Replace it with:

Step 4: Save the file and reload your Joomla page — the booking form should now embed correctly.

Note: This fix is only required if your Easy!Appointments installation is hosted on a different domain from your Joomla site (e.g. bookings.example.com vs example.com). If Easy!Appointments lives in a subfolder of the same domain (e.g. example.com/easyappointments), iframe embedding works without this change.

field.name: width
field.label: Iframe Width
field.description: Enter the width of the iframe (e.g. 100%, 600px).

field.name: height
field.label: Iframe Height
field.description: Enter the height of the iframe (e.g. 600px).

field.name: provider_id
field.label: Provider ID
field.description: Enter the provider ID if applicable.

field.name: service_id
field.label: Service ID
field.description: Enter the service ID if applicable.

field.name: iframe_title
field.label: Iframe Title
field.description: Accessible title for the booking iframe.

field.name: show_open_link
field.label: Show Open Link
field.description: Display a direct link below the embedded booking page.

field.name: open_link_text
field.label: Open Link Text
field.description: Text shown for the direct booking page link.
field.default: Open booking page in a new tab
